quote: Nothing in the world is ever completely wrong. Even a stopped clock is right twice a day. – Paulo Coelho
fact: The shortest war in history was between Zanzibar and England in 1896. Zanzibar surrendered after 38 minutes.

joke: What are the strongest days of the week? Saturday and Sunday...the rest are weekdays.
